# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against 380ce4da9f8f29b1894d7ca3e1eb5f2c00a9a238, focusing on the changed source files and ignoring .ralph-burning orchestration state. No correctness, safety, or robustness findings to amend. Targeted pr_watch tests, clippy, and fmt passed; a nix build was started but interrupted during this review, so it was not counted as fresh validation.

## Amendments

None.
